title: prunella laciniata var. violacea
intro: Prunella laciniata var. violacea, also known as Self-Heal or Heal All, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its small, delicate flowers in shades of purple, blue, or pink. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of rosmarinic acid and flavonoids. Self-Heal is said to offer various health benefits, including soothing wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
